en: In semi-somnambulism S. W. gave some of those taking part in the séances the opportunity to compare her with the "Seherin von Prevorst" (Prophetess of Prevorst). This suggestion was not without results. S. W. gave hints of earlier existences which she had already lived through, and after a few weeks she suddenly disclosed a whole system of reincarnations, although she had never before mentioned anything of the kind. Ivenes is a spiritual being who is something more than the spirits of other human beings. Every human spirit must incorporate himself twice in the course of the centuries. But Ivenes must incorporate herself at least once every two hundred years; besides herself only two other persons have participated in this fate, namely, Swedenborg and Miss Florence Cook (Crookes's famous medium). S. W. calls these two personages her brother and sister. She gave no information about their pre-existences. In the beginning of the nineteenth century Ivenes was Frau Hauffe, the Prophetess of Prevorst; at the end of the eighteenth century, a clergyman's wife in central Germany (locality unknown). As the latter she was seduced by Goethe and bore him a child. In the fifteenth century she was a Saxon countess, and had the poetic name of Thierfelsenburg. Ulrich von Gerbenstein is a relative from that line. The interval of 300 years, and her adventure with Goethe, must be atoned for by the sorrows of the Prophetess of Prevorst. In the thirteenth century she was a noblewoman of Southern France, called de Valours, and was burnt as a witch. From the thirteenth century to the Christian persecution under Nero there were numerous reincarnations of which S. W. could give no detailed account. In the Christian persecution under Nero she played a martyr's part. Then comes a period of obscurity till the time of David, when Ivenes was an ordinary Jewess. After her death she received from Astaf, an angel from a high heaven, the mandate for her future wonderful career. In all her pre-existences she was a medium and an intermediary in the intercourse between this side and the other. Her brothers and sisters are equally old and have the like vocation. In her various pre-existences she was sometimes married, and in this way gradually founded a whole system of relationships with whose endless complicated inter-relations she occupied herself in many ecstasies. Thus, for example, about the eighth century she was the mother of her earthly father and, moreover, of her grandfather, and mine. Hence the striking friendship of these two old gentlemen, otherwise strangers. As Mme. de Valours she was the present writer's mother. When she was burnt as a witch the writer took it much to heart, and went into a cloister at Rouen, wore a grey habit, became Prior, wrote a work on Botany and died at over eighty years of age. In the refectory of the cloister there hung a picture of Mme. de Valours, in which she was depicted in a half-reclining position. (S. W. in the semi-somnambulic state often took this position on the sofa. It corresponds exactly to that of Mme. Recamier in David's well-known picture.) A gentleman who often took part in the séances, who had some slight resemblance to the writer, was also one of her sons from that period. Around this core of relationship there grouped themselves, more or less intimately connected, all the persons in any way related or known to her. One came from the fifteenth century, another—a cousin—from the eighteenth century, and so on.
zh: 在半夢遊狀態下，S. W. 讓一些參與降靈會的人有機會將她與「普雷福斯特的女先知」進行比較。這個暗示並非沒有結果。S. W. 給出了她早已歷經的先前存在的線索，幾週後，她突然揭示了一整套輪迴體系，儘管她此前從未提及任何此類事情。伊維內斯是一個靈性存有，其本質超越其他凡人的靈魂。每個人的靈魂在數個世紀的歷程中都必須兩次化身。但伊維內斯至少每兩百年就必須化身一次；除了她之外，只有另外兩個人參與了這個命運，即史威登堡和弗洛倫斯·庫克小姐（克魯克斯著名的靈媒）。S. W. 稱這兩位人物為她的兄弟和姊妹。她沒有提供關於他們先前存在的資訊。在十九世紀初，伊維內斯是豪費夫人，即普雷福斯特的女先知；在十八世紀末，她是德國中部（地點不詳）一位牧師的妻子。作為後者，她被歌德引誘並為他生下一個孩子。在十五世紀，她是一位薩克森伯爵夫人，並擁有詩意的名字「蒂爾費爾森堡」。烏爾裡希·馮·格本斯坦是那個世系的一位親戚。三百年的間隔以及她與歌德的冒險，必須由普雷福斯特女先知的憂傷來贖罪。在十三世紀，她是法國南部一位名叫德·瓦盧爾的貴族婦女，並被當作女巫燒死。從十三世紀到尼祿統治下的基督徒迫害時期，有許多輪迴，S. W. 無法給出詳細描述。在尼祿統治下的基督徒迫害時期，她扮演了殉道者的角色。接著是一段模糊的時期，直到大衛時代，當時伊維內斯是一位普通的猶太婦女。她死後，從來自高天的一位天使阿斯塔夫那裡，得到了她未來奇妙使命的委任。在她所有的先前存在中，她都是一個靈媒，是此岸與彼岸之間交流的中介。她的兄弟姊妹同樣古老，並擁有相同的天職。在她不同的先前存在中，她有時結婚，並以此方式逐漸建立了一整套關係體系，她在許多出神狀態中致力於這些關係無窮無盡的複雜交互。例如，大約在八世紀，她是她塵世父親的母親，而且還是她祖父以及我的祖父的母親。因此，這兩位老先生之間有著驚人的友誼，儘管他們原本是陌生人。作為德·瓦盧爾夫人，她是本文作者的母親。當她被當作女巫燒死時，作者對此深感悲痛，並進入魯昂的一家修道院，穿著灰色會衣，成為院長，撰寫了一部植物學著作，並在八十多歲時去世。在修道院的食堂裡，掛著一幅德·瓦盧爾夫人的畫像，畫中她以半躺的姿勢呈現。（S. W. 在半夢遊狀態下經常在沙發上採取這個姿勢。這與大衛著名畫作中雷卡米耶夫人的姿勢完全吻合。）一位經常參加降靈會的先生，與作者有些微相似，也是她那個時期的一個兒子。圍繞這個關係核心，所有與她有某種關聯或認識的人，都以或緊或疏的聯繫聚集在一起。一個來自十五世紀，另一個——一位表親——來自十八世紀，如此類推。
